tasks.label: Initialize and force-push to GitHub
args: Set-Location 'c:/project ai/fresher-summarizer'; if (-not (Test-Path .git)) { git init } ; git remote remove origin 2>$null; git remote add origin 'https://github.com/saud-prog07/LocalLLM-Paper-Summarizer.git'; git add -A; if (-not (git diff --cached --quiet)) { git commit -m 'Initial commit' } else { git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit' }; git branch -M main; git push --force origin main
